prompt: Create a cinematic wide-angle 16:9 interior scene of an ancient stone hall or temple atrium, with rough plaster walls, large square stone floor slabs, and a moody teal-and-orange color grade. The room is empty of people and lit only by firelight: include exactly 3 wall-mounted flaming torches, with 2 torches on the left wall and 1 torch on the rear wall, plus 1 large circular sunken fire pit in the right foreground containing burning logs and tall flames. Add exactly 2 massive cylindrical stone columns rising from floor to ceiling, one near the center and one near the right side, both catching warm orange rim light from the fire. Include exactly 2 simple dark wooden benches, one long bench along the left foreground wall and one long bench against the rear wall. Include exactly 6 clay pottery vessels: 1 tall jug in the left foreground, 2 vessels near the rear-left bench, and 3 vessels near the rear-right wall. Show exactly 2 stairways: one central rear staircase ascending into a dark doorway and one partially visible staircase at the far right. Use realistic ancient Mediterranean/Roman-inspired architecture, worn stone textures, soot-stained plaster, soft smoke haze, volumetric fire glow, deep shadows, no modern objects, no people, no text, no watermark. The camera is at standing eye level with a slightly low cinematic perspective, emphasizing depth, warm fire reflections on the stone floor, and a quiet mysterious atmosphere.
promptEn: Create a cinematic wide-angle 16:9 interior scene of an ancient stone hall or temple atrium, with rough plaster walls, large square stone floor slabs, and a moody teal-and-orange color grade. The room is empty of people and lit only by firelight: include exactly 3 wall-mounted flaming torches, with 2 torches on the left wall and 1 torch on the rear wall, plus 1 large circular sunken fire pit in the right foreground containing burning logs and tall flames. Add exactly 2 massive cylindrical stone columns rising from floor to ceiling, one near the center and one near the right side, both catching warm orange rim light from the fire. Include exactly 2 simple dark wooden benches, one long bench along the left foreground wall and one long bench against the rear wall. Include exactly 6 clay pottery vessels: 1 tall jug in the left foreground, 2 vessels near the rear-left bench, and 3 vessels near the rear-right wall. Show exactly 2 stairways: one central rear staircase ascending into a dark doorway and one partially visible staircase at the far right. Use realistic ancient Mediterranean/Roman-inspired architecture, worn stone textures, soot-stained plaster, soft smoke haze, volumetric fire glow, deep shadows, no modern objects, no people, no text, no watermark. The camera is at standing eye level with a slightly low cinematic perspective, emphasizing depth, warm fire reflections on the stone floor, and a quiet mysterious atmosphere.
promptZh: 创建一个 16:9 的电影感广角室内场景，展现一座古老的石厅或神庙中庭。墙壁为粗糙的灰泥材质，地面铺设大型方形石板，整体采用青橙色调的电影感调色。房间内空无一人，仅由火光照亮：包含 3 把挂在墙上的火把，左侧墙壁 2 把，后墙 1 把；右前方设有一个大型圆形下沉式火坑，内有燃烧的木头和高耸的火焰。添加 2 根从地面延伸至天花板的巨大圆柱，一根靠近中心，一根靠近右侧，两根圆柱均呈现出火光投射的温暖橙色轮廓光。放置 2 条简约的深色木长椅，一条沿左前方墙壁放置，另一条靠后墙放置。包含 6 个陶制容器：左前方 1 个高罐，左后方长椅附近 2 个，右后墙附近 3 个。展示 2 处楼梯：一处位于后方中央，通向黑暗的门口；另一处位于最右侧，仅部分可见。采用逼真的古地中海/罗马风格建筑，呈现磨损的石材纹理、烟熏的灰泥、柔和的烟雾、体积感火光和深邃的阴影。画面中无现代物品、无人物、无文字、无水印。摄像机处于站立视线高度，采用略微低角度的电影视角，强调空间深度、石地板上温暖的火光反射以及静谧神秘的氛围。
